_comment_why: Uses 'cmd /c' to work around a Windows error where Claude Desktop expands 'npx' to 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\npx.cmd' — the space in 'Program Files' causes cmd.exe to fail. This config keeps npx unquoted so Windows resolves it via PATH instead.
_comment_macos: macOS / Linux users: use claude-desktop.json instead.
_comment_steps: Step 1: Add WITHOUT a token first — remove the --header flag and token from the args string, restart Claude Desktop, then say: 'Use the QrVeloz MCP tool to request an API key'. Step 2: Replace YOUR_API_KEY with the returned token, restart again.
